svg.title: Battery Analyzer Deployment Diagram
svg.desc: Deployment diagram showing Android device, cloud server, and their communication links

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Kotlin foreground service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Flutter app layer include?')
sendPrompt('What does the SQLite database store?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Shared Preferences?')
sendPrompt('What Android APIs does Battery Analyzer use?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend do?')
sendPrompt('How do XGBoost and Isolation Forest work in the backend?')
sendPrompt('What does the TimescaleDB store in the backend?')
